comparison_window.label: current period 2026-05-18 to 2026-05-24 vs prior period 2026-05-11 to 2026-05-17

summaryJson.summary_text: Comparison: 2026-05-18 to 2026-05-24 spending was $412.34 vs $390.12 for 2026-05-11 to 2026-05-17 (+5.7%). The largest avoidable item was a $12 returned payment fee, and your recurring Demo Streaming subscription remains steady at $19.99.

insights.insight: A returned payment fee appeared this week.
insights.action: Check the linked payment account before the next due date.

insights.insight: The subscription is stable and recurring monthly.
insights.action: Keep it only if it is still used.

insights.insight: Groceries were the largest normal operating spend this week.
insights.action: No action needed unless this is above your weekly target.
